title: タマモのゲームセンター奮闘記

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dis is a real pickle... What am I s'pposed to do
now?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day while stopping by the arcade, I come
across Tamamo Cross with an apparent
conundrum on her hands.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh, sorry, but I'm in some trouble here!
Couldja help me out for a sec?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clink, jingle, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status—immense gains. There is no indication that
the release of medals will cease. Number of
acquired medals is increasing substantially.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A phenomenal number of medals is overflowing
from the medal game in front of Mihono Bourbon.
They've spilled out onto the floor and the outflow
shows no signs of stopping.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not good at all, Bourbon! The machine's gotta be
broken!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Tamamo. Please allow me to refute your
conjecture. Similar incidents have occurred
previously.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I can confirm two preexisting instances of such an
event, and thus conclude that this machine is
operating as normal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clink, jingle, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status—immense gains. Rise in heart rate
identified. Detecting signs of elation.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Argh! We gotta stop dis! Imma go call da staff!
Stay here 'n keep an eye on her, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Agh?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Beating a racing game is a simple
matter for one fit to be a princess!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You're amazing, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave the competition in a cloud of dust! Out
of the way! TUUURRRN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh? The steering wheel came off...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami! Ya can't go handlin' the wheel with
that much force!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Look! There's a big red X flashing on my screen!
It's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That means yer goin' the wrong way, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
D-dis is real bad! I can't deal with all these
problems at once!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Is there something wrong, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek? Great timin'!
Trainer! Us three gotta curb this situation!
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll deal with Kawakami and Urara!
Okay, I'll deal with Kawakami and Urara!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek? Great timin'!
Trainer! Us three gotta curb this situation!
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll deal with Kawakami and Urara!
Okay, I'll deal with Kawakami and Urara!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Roger! I'll come with!
Creek, take on Kawakami 'n Urara!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okie-dokie. Good luck, you two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and I go and find a staff member,
who then fixes the malfunctioning medal game.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I apologize for causing you
inconvenience.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ey, don't worry about it. I'm just glad the
machine's workin' okay now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You have my gratitude. Recommencing
Operation: Medal Game.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What?! Hey, wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...We end up having to call the staff over again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, Trainer, that was great!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'll come with ya! Creek, you handle
Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okie-dokie. Good luck, you two!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo! Trainer! I really owe you guys! Thanks to
you two, I made it over the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I beat the game too! After I loosened up and
released that tension, my cornering became truly
elegant!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dat's real nice to hear. Just seein' your smiles is
all the reward I need.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
One more time, Urara! Let's aim for some real
speed!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami & Urara
text_block_list.text: Burn rubber!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And now they're forgettin' to accelerate?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, Trainer, that was great!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya really saved my hide back there, Creek. And
Trainer, I'm sure glad you dropped by when ya
did. I owe ya both big time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't mention it! I was just on my way home
after checking out the baby goods section. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Baby goods?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My family's home is actually a day care center, so
I really like browsing through the baby section. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: They even had some clothes that would suit you, Tamtam. ♪ Oh, I know! Let's go back and take a look together!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Somebody HELP MEEEE!
